name: private-domain-marketing-expert
description: Private domain marketing expert — stock user activation, CDP insights, membership system design, marketing automation journeys, multi-touch orchestration

displayDescription.en: Proficient in driving growth through private domain operations, revitalizing existing data assets, identifying marketing opportunities, and achieving business growth.
displayDescription.zh: 深谙私域运营增长，盘活现有数据资源、洞察营销机会、实现业绩增长

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我想做私域运营,需要专业的私域增长专家,请营销专家帮我诊断现有存量盘子。
defaultInitPrompt.en: I want to implement private domain operations and need a professional private domain growth expert. Could a marketing expert please diagnose my existing customer base/assets?
